title: About the Resettlement Assistance Program - Canada.ca
content:
## About the Resettlement Assistance Program
Through the Resettlement Assistance Program, we work with many service  providers to support the delivery of services to newcomers to Canada.
Learn about the Resettlement Assistance Program:
- Resettlement  Assistance Program Service Provider Handbook
- Resettlement  Assistance Program  terms  and conditions
